When converting video transcripts into learning notes, always follow the instructions defined in [create_doc.md](../create_doc.md).

Key rules:
- Read `create_doc.md` before generating any note
- Follow the exact output structure, formatting rules, and core principles defined there
- Save notes as sequentially numbered markdown files in the appropriate `*-notes/` directory (e.g., `spring-notes/`)
- Use kebab-case naming: `{number}-{topic-name}.md`
